allow: Bash(PGPASSWORD="rice_secret_dev" psql -h localhost -p 5435 -U rice_user -d rice_marketplace -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as current_users FROM users;")
Bash(docker exec rice_postgres psql -U rice_user -d rice_marketplace -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as current_users FROM users;")
Bash(docker exec rice_postgres psql -U rice_user -d rice_marketplace -f /tmp/seed.sql)
Bash(docker exec rice_postgres psql -U rice_user -d rice_marketplace -c "SELECT phone, role, name FROM users ORDER BY phone;")
Bash(docker exec rice_postgres psql -U rice_user -d rice_marketplace -c ":*)
Bash(docker exec rice_postgres psql -U rice_user -d rice_marketplace -t -c ":*)

Bash(docker exec rice_postgres psql -U postgres -d rice_marketplace -c "ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS district VARCHAR\(100\); ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ward VARCHAR\(100\);")

Bash(docker exec rice_postgres psql -U rice_user -d rice_marketplace -c "ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS district VARCHAR\(100\); ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ward VARCHAR\(100\);")
